name: Show and Tell

7: show_and_tell + (emrakul OR griselbrand OR omni) + blue_source

goal_sequence.action: Brainstorm / Ponder aggressively to find Show and Tell + finisher
Hold Force of Will / Spell Pierce; Thoughtseize T1 if fast combo opponent
Cast Show and Tell on U{U}, put Emrakul/Griselbrand/Omniscience into play

notes: Show and Tell cheats a finisher into play for 3 mana. Omniscience chains into cast-free card draw. Grisel draws 7 on ETB. Emrakul wins on swing.
